mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reply(replyno, boardno, memberno, content, rdate, blind) VALUES(reply_seq.nextval, #{boardno}, #{memberno}, #{content}, sysdate, #{blind})
mapper.select: SELECT replyno, boardno, memberno, content, rdate, blind FROM reply WHERE boardno = #{boardno} ORDER BY replyno DESC

SELECT r.replyno, r.boardno, r.memberno, r.content, r.blind, TO_CHAR(r.rdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS rdate, m.id, m.nickname, m.profile FROM reply r INNER JOIN member m ON r.memberno = m.memberno WHERE r.boardno = #{boardno} ORDER BY r.replyno DESC

SELECT r.replyno, r.boardno, r.memberno, r.content, r.blind, TO_CHAR(r.rdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS rdate, r.id, r.nickname, r.profile FROM ( SELECT rm.*, ROWNUM AS rnum FROM ( SELECT r.replyno, r.boardno, r.memberno, r.content, r.blind, r.rdate, m.id, m.nickname, m.profile FROM reply r INNER JOIN member m ON r.memberno = m.memberno WHERE r.boardno = #{boardno} ORDER BY r.replyno DESC ) rm WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) r WHERE r.rnum > #{startRow}
